channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: How Israel, the US and Iran deploy covert ops
item.description: Sometimes called sleeper cells, these anonymous agents employ deception to spy, sabotage or kill.

item.title: Israeli strike on Gaza police kills officers
item.description: An Israeli attack on a police vehicle in central Gaza has killed eight officers including a senior police official.

item.title: Map shows how 16 days of attacks have evolved in US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: Here's a day-by-day breakdown of attacks, illustrating the targets hit and the weapons used since February 28.

item.title: The Iran war picture blackout
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Linh Nguyen breaks down Planet Labs delaying the publication of its satellite imagery during an active war.

item.title: How closing the Strait of Hormuz raises your grocery bill
item.description: Closing the Strait of Hormuz raised oil prices. It also raises the cost of bread.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 17 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: Dubai contained a fire near its airport and temporarily suspended flights, while Trump claimed Iran wants to negotiate.

item.title: Drone strike disrupts Dubai flights as Iran continues Gulf attacks
item.description: Iran has sought to justify its attacks on Gulf countries, hitting civilian infrastructure as well as US assets.

item.title: Japan begins release of oil reserves as Iran war sparks energy crisis
item.description: Tokyo's move comes as oil prices remain elevated amid the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Large protest held in London against US-Israeli war on Iran
item.description: Thousands of demonstrators took to the streets of London to oppose US-Israeli aggression against Iran, Lebanon and Gaza.

item.title: Stars at Oscars 2026 call for end to war in Gaza and Iran
item.description: Actors and filmmakers spoke out at the Oscars 2026 in Los Angeles against the US-Israeli war on Iran and the genocide.
